name: insure-agent
description: Insurance Agency Management System Coding Agent

scripts.copy-static: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('src','server','static');const dst=path.join('dist','server','static');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f));console.log('static copied:',fs.readdirSync(dst).join(', '));"
